MindAI is an enterprise-grade, AI-powered mental health platform. It combines clinical psychological frameworks (PHQ-9) with machine learning (Scikit-learn) to predict burnout and provide personalized behavioral interventions. Built with a scalable microservices architecture using Django, PostgreSQL, and React.

A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch.
AI-based cybersecurity framework for smart healthcare systems using machine learning techniques for threat detection and security maturity analysis.

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

The proposed system introduces a machine learning-based framework for accurate weather prediction, designed to overcome the limitations of traditional forecasting methods. The system focuses on predicting temperature, rainfall, and humidity using historical weather data from NOAA

A privacy-preserving healthcare AI framework aligned with DPDP regulations, combining machine learning, secure data pipelines, and analytics to enable compliant predictive modeling and clinical decision support.

This repository presents ML-DTRM, a Machine LearningEnhanced Dynamic Threshold Resource Management framework designed for fog computing environments. The proposed system integrates LSTM-based time-series workload prediction with dynamic threshold-based scheduling to enable proactive resource allocation.
A hybrid classification framework for log data that integrates machine learning and deep learning techniques to achieve robust and accurate log classification.

An advanced security monitoring framework that integrates Wazuh SIEM with Machine Learning to automate event correlation and alert classification. This project focuses on reducing "alert fatigue" by using Random Forest classifiers to distinguish between real threats and false positives in real-time network traffic.

Physics-informed machine learning framework for predicting and reducing harmonic distortion (THD) in residential power systems using AO-NFRS and Bayesian-optimized ANFIS.

A data-driven personal finance analytics system that calculates income tax liability under the Indian tax framework, assesses financial health using key indicators, and predicts financial stress levels with explainable insights. Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

A research-ready federated learning simulation framework designed for edge AI research and education. This project demonstrates privacy-preserving machine learning where multiple devices collaboratively train a model without sharing raw data.

This repository contains the implementation of the research paper titled Comparative Performance of Machine Learning Regressors for Wind Power Forecasting: A Diagnostic Framework. The study utilizes wind turbine SCADA data to perform a diagnostic analysis using baseline regression models

Machine learning workflows involve complex steps like preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, tuning, and deployment, which require expertise. This work presents a no-code AutoML platform built with PyCaret v3 and Streamlit that automates data ingestion, preprocessing, modeling, evaluation, and deployment.

9class wafer defect classification + perclass anomaly detection. EfficientNetV2 with coordinate channels, twophase training, ONNX + ONNX Runtime verification (max diff < 1e4), PCA + Isolation Forest, SQLite storage.

machine learningintegrated framework for diffuse in vivo flow cytometry (DiFC), using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to distinguish circulating tumor cell (CTC) signals from artifacts. The approach leverages both amplitude and temporal peak shape to improve detection accuracy and reduce false positives compared to threshold-based methods.

Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

This project implements a hand gesture recognition system using computer vision and machine learning techniques. It detects and classifies hand gestures from images or real-time webcam input, enabling touchless humancomputer interaction. The system is built using Python with libraries such as OpenCV and deep learning frameworks.

It aims to overcome the limitations of conventional maintenance practices by providing real-time insights and predictive analytics based on historical sensor data.

This repository provides the code for the study Estimating Immune Age from B-Cell Receptor Repertoire Using Machine Learning. It implements an end-to-end framework for extracting multi-dimensional bulk BCR repertoire features and training machine learning models to quantify immunosenescence.

The goal of this project  is to develop machine learning frameworks capable of identifying understudied species within continuous audio data from Brazil's Pantanal wetlands. Successful solutions will help advance biodiversity monitoring in the last wild places on Earth.
Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

A face recognition attendance system using Django and machine learning involves using the Django web framework to build a web-based application for recording and managing employee/student attendance, and using machine learning algorithms to implement the face recognition functionality.

A behavioral classification framework that translates statistically observable customer interaction patterns into named archetypes called Chaos Kittens. Designed for telecom support environments  applicable to any customer-facing AI system. Built for human training, machine learning, and churn prediction modeling.
A simulation framework for federated learning experiments, allowing researchers to test and evaluate privacy-preserving machine learning algorithms on decentralized datasets.

This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

Machine learning research framework for crypto trading with data pipeline, feature engineering, and backtesting.

The code provided in the repository is for the website presenting Lucid and Universal Bio-applicability Evaluation of Nano-formulations (LUBEN): A Machine Learning-Driven Framework for Advancing Nanomedicine.

Large-scale empirical study of machine learning approaches for change-point detection in financial time series, comparing neural architectures (LSTM, GRU, Transformer, TFT, Mamba) with classical methods under a unified stochastic simulation framework.

Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinsons Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinsons Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinsons disease trajectories.
Interactive dashboard and traffic simulation for the TinyOL lightweight edge machine learning framework.

Mind Monitor AI is a machine learning framework designed to detect early indicators of depression, anxiety, and psychological distress within social media text using Natural Language Processing and sentiment analysis.
A novel framework combining machine learning and time series analysis to forecast future suicide rates effectively across different regions.

A cross-platform (Python/Java) agentic AI framework designed to automate clinical diagnostics. The system employs specialized autonomous agents to ingest patient data, execute machine learning inferences, and provide actionable medical decision support. Optimized for early detection of chronic and infectious diseases.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
A Python framework for selecting fair and accurate Machine Learning models using Pareto Frontier and TOPSIS multicriteria decision-making, supporting various normalization techniques.
This is a machine learning framework built by C++ with C++ metaprogramming. It is built just for fun.

Machine learning framework for predicting bulk modulus of inorganic materials using RF, SVR, GBR, XGBoost, and CatBoost. Integrates Matminer/Pymatgen features, SHAP interpretability, and GPAW-based DFT validation, enabling accurate, scalable, and cost-effective materials property prediction.

A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.
A machine learning framework for predicting NLTE departure coefficients in 3-D stellar atmospheres using Factorized Fourier Neural Operators (FFNO)

A bare-metal, dependency-free Machine Learning framework written in C and Assembly. Features static memory arenas, reverse-mode Autograd, SIMD (AVX2/NEON) optimizations, and INT8 quantization for edge and TinyML environments.

A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.
An advanced Monte Carlo simulation framework for stock price prediction with machine learning-enhanced volatility modeling and multiple stochastic processes.

AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU. This repository implements a simple AutoML framework for regression using simulated annealing to select models and tune hyperparameters, with different temperature multipliers for model and hyperparameter changes. The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.
